title: Sour Dense Braised Red Onions Moroccan Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-inspired Moroccan dish featuring a dense blend of red onions braised in a tangy sauce with spices for a spicy and flavorful twist, suitable for egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: pungent spice to add depth of flavor

instructions: Chop the onion into thin wedges.
In a large mixing bowl, combine onions and lemon juice. Mix gently but thoroughly.
Add cumin and red pepper flakes. Stir well to distribute evenly.
Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 45 minutes or until the onions are tender and have a dense, caramelized texture.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
